prompt: A breathtaking, hyper-realistic landscape of an {argument name="setting" default="alpine lake village"}. In the foreground, a {argument name="foreground element" default="wooden pier with 1 empty bench"} extends into the crystal-clear blue water from the bottom left, framed by vibrant {argument name="flower color" default="bright pink and red"} flowers on the left and tall green reeds on the right. The calm lake perfectly reflects the scenery and features exactly 1 small red rowboat floating on the left and 1 white sailboat on the right. On the right shoreline, a picturesque European village with 1 prominent pointed church spire and traditional houses is nestled at the base of lush green hills. Towering {argument name="mountain type" default="snow-capped jagged peaks"} dominate the background under a {argument name="weather" default="bright sunny day with fluffy white clouds"}. The lighting is vibrant, idyllic, and highly detailed.
translatedPrompt: 一幅令人惊叹的超写实景观，描绘了 {argument name="setting" default="阿尔卑斯湖畔村庄"}。在前景中，一个 {argument name="foreground element" default="带有 1 张空长椅的木质码头"} 从左下角延伸至清澈湛蓝的湖水中，左侧点缀着鲜艳的 {argument name="flower color" default="亮粉色和红色"} 花朵，右侧则是高耸的绿色芦苇。平静的湖面完美地倒映着周围的景色，湖面上漂浮着 1 艘红色小划艇（位于左侧）和 1 艘白色帆船（位于右侧）。在右侧岸边，一个风景如画的欧洲村庄坐落在郁郁葱葱的青山脚下，拥有 1 座显眼的尖顶教堂和传统房屋。背景中，高耸的 {argument name="mountain type" default="白雪皑皑的锯齿状山峰"} 在 {argument name="weather" default="阳光明媚、白云朵朵的天气"} 下显得格外壮观。整体光影效果鲜明、充满田园气息且细节丰富。

breakdown.creativeCore: 田园诗般的阿尔卑斯湖畔村庄景观：生成高度精细、风景如画的阿尔卑斯湖畔村庄景观，并支持自定义前景和背景元素。
breakdown.subject: 界面
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
